entry.title: Re: SAP Android SDK - offline odata - batch CUD operations
entry.content:
Thanks Robin,

I have implemented your solution. I worked with plenty of SDK version, and it's the first time I have to do it. I don't know why. (I'm working with the offline odata)

Anyway, I'm still facing an issue. When the user confirm an action, for example, i create a batchRequest and changeSet and put all the modifcations in it and i call the data sync just after that. It works if the sync is ok 

            val batchRequest = RequestBatch().
            val changeSet = ChangeSet()

            //update device in changeset
            changeSet.updateEntity(
                updatedDeviceEntity,
                HttpHeaders.empty,
                OfflineWorkerUtil.defautlRequestOptions
            )

            //update register's device in changeset
            updatedRegistersList.forEach { updatedRegister ->
                changeSet.updateEntity(
                    updatedRegister,
                    HttpHeaders.empty,
                    OfflineWorkerUtil.defautlRequestOptions
                )
            }

            //update MRU in changeset
            updatedMRU?.let { updateMRU ->
                changeSet.updateEntity(
                    updateMRU,
                    HttpHeaders.empty,
                    OfflineWorkerUtil.defautlRequestOptions
                )
            }

            batchRequest.addChanges(changeSet)
            api.processBatch(batchRequest)

But in the case, i haven't connectivity (i'm using offline odata), the second times, the same code is executed. (I also create a batchrequest and a changeSet). When, the sync is done, i only see 1 batch with only the first object in it. 

I can see in the offline provider, all the request queued. But, only the first is send to the backend.

Is someone have a clue on this behavior ? Is it a issue/bug ?

Thanks 

Yohann

SAP BTP SDK for Android SAP Mobile Services OData Android

entry.title: Re: Copy Table from query manager does not copy all the rows
entry.content:
Hi,

what @Johan_Hakkesteegt mentioned is the most likely culprit (special characters). Comparing data on both screens shows that the bottom row is the same, which means most likely all data was copied. But other than that, is there any reason why you are using this method instead of the built-in Export to Excel function?

BR,

Matija

entry.title: Link Solution Order with Project Item (linked existing project) for Billingcreation
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I am using the Solution Order with a Project Item. I link an existing project to the Solution Order Item. 

during billing createn via "Create Billing Documents" I would like to filter for the Solution Order and see all related Billing Document requests. Filtern works but I only see a value in the Solution Order column if I create a project through the Solution Order. If I link an existing project to a Solution Order, this field stays empty. 

Am I missingn something here? Do I have to run a job or something? 

Thanks for the support. 

BR,

Sorosch

entry.title: Re: How to Control the Visibility of CRUD and Custom Actions in Fiori Elements Based on Authorizatio
entry.content: Hi @MioYasutake nice blog! The @odata is missing at various positions, docu about singleton: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/advanced/odata#singletons

entry.title: How to create an Analytical Report for "Receipts Not Invoiced" in SAP Ariba ?
entry.content:
I need to generate am analytical report in SAP Ariba that identifies receipts that have not been invoiced (i.e. goods received but no corresponding invoice).

What I've tried:

1. Used the Public Reports function with:

    * Fact One: "Receipts"

    * Fact Two: "Invoices" (to find a link to PO and/or Receipt ID)

    * Filter: invoice_ID is NULL

2. Included measured like Receipt Amount, Quantity Received

3. Export to Excel for further analysis

Issues/Questions:

1. Are there existing public report templates for this scenario that I can reuse?

2. Best way to calculate "Days uninvoiced" - should I use a custom formula in Ariba or post-export in Excel ?

3. Recommended filters (e.g. date range, supplier, po type) to optimize performance

Request:

If anyone has:

1. A prebuilt report template (JSON/shareable format)

2. Step-by-Step guidance for the pivot layout

3. Tips to automate/schedule this report

I'd greatly appreciate your insights.

Robert

entry.title: Account & requires a true account assignment relevant to cost accounting in bank statement items
entry.content:
Error KI248 Account & requires a true account assignment relevant to cost accounting is generated even after following instructions of kba 3113575 - Error message KI248 when posting a General Journal Entry we still get error in simulation of reprocessing of bank statement item 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Account & requires a true account assignment relevant...
entry.content:
Check if item created before change.  This is stored in back processing app.  It is likely caused by the fact that this item was created before the mentioned changes.

If you add a Profitability Segment manually the simulation works as expected without any error.

If you try to create a new item for the same account then the automatic assignments to a profitability segment works as described in the KBA 3113575 - Error message KI248 when posting a General Journal Entry  and newly created item already assignment to a profitability segment. Then posting should work as expected.

entry.title: Re: Choosing the Right Analytical Tool: A Comprehensive Guide for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Excellent Blog...very informative...Thanks for sharing.

entry.title: Re: Missing Data in UPL
entry.content: The missing objects are methods and function modules. Below is the way the objects were executed.

entry.title: Re: Cross model copy from old model (Account base) to New...
entry.content:
Hi MoonJun,

 I have tried the workaround which you have propose but there seems to be decimal difference compare to the old Local Value. I have provided an numbers of old model as well as new .

 

Old modelLCGC
  149519.09940964.1363026
  9351.04452561.9299743
    
New LCAmount in GC
  149519.0989996040964.136302600
  9351.044499702561.92997430
    

 

Is there any possibility that SAC does backend some roundup and hence this is something came up. Request you to provide your opinion to tackle the same

 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to monitor SM13 in SAP Cloud ALM Health Monitorin...
entry.content:
Hello,

Let me provide additional insights, on top of the previous reply.

As already indicated, Health Monitoring is providing a set of high level indicators, and SM13 is currently not covered.
However, keep in mind that SAP Cloud ALM is composed of a series of so called use-cases (applications).
Even so, every use-case is concentrating on different monitoring aspects, you have some overlaps. This means you can typically also monitor further aspects of your ABAP system, using Integration & Exception Monitoring. 
Looking at the indicators, covered by Integration & Exception Monitoring, you will noticed that ABAP Update errors are supported by that use-case :
https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/operations/expert-portal/integration-monitoring/int-mon-content.html

entry.title: Re: Missing Data in UPL
entry.content: The missing objects are methods and function modules. Below is the way the objects were executed. Tcode SM30 - Enter table name and click EDIT 2. At this point, the two FMs are already executed. Through a customized Tcode few methods are executed

entry.title: Re: Exited with status 137 (out of memory), reason: CRASHED
entry.content: Have a look at the documentation here: https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/customizing-java-virtual-machine-jvm-settings to look at various options. Last resort is to increase the RAM allocation to the application.

entry.title: Re: "Script Task" are now available in SAP Build Process Automation.
entry.content:
Hmmm.... Just Idea

 

I believe that I can build it by using Control’s "Condition" and "GotoStep".
In some cases, it may be necessary to prepare a custom variable as a counter and increment it by +1 in a script task. When thinking in terms of pro-code, please consider constructing a loop not with a "FOR" statement, but by using "IF-THEN" and "GOTO".

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Use inbound service in BAdi to update the purchase or...
entry.content:
Unfortunately, there is no direct way to update the Purchase Order Net Price using standard SAP functionality or BAdIs in S/4HANA Cloud. Here are the key points:

  1. The BAdI MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM does not allow changing the Net Price Amount value .

  2. There is no specific BAdI to directly modify the net price of a purchase order .

  3. For controlling the price determination process when creating or changing a purchase order, you can use the BAdI MM_PUR_S4_PO_DEFINE_CNDNCTRL . However, this does not directly allow updating an existing net price.

  4. The inbound service you mentioned (SAP_COM_0053) is for Purchase Order Integration, but it doesn't provide a direct method to update the net price .

As an alternative approach, you could consider:

  1. Using the BAdI MM_PUR_S4_PO_DEFINE_CNDNCTRL to influence the price determination process for new or changed purchase orders .

  2. Exploring if there are any APIs or services available within your SAP S/4HANA Cloud system that might allow updating PO prices indirectly.

  3. If direct modification is absolutely necessary, you may need to contact SAP support for a custom solution or explore if there are any extension points available in your specific SAP S/4HANA Cloud implementation.

Remember that modifying prices directly can have significant implications on financial processes and data integrity, so any changes should be carefully considered and implemented with proper controls and approvals.

entry.title: Re: Function Module in Variant Configuration
entry.content:
Dear Ashish Mishra,

Try using the Restrictable characteristics dependency.
Check out the below SAP help portal for more information.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/a73402f511734e6eac56063e631bf24e/8063b6531de6b64ce10000000a174cb4.html

Hope this helps!!!

Best Regards,
Surya.

entry.title: Re: Create one Purchase order out of each Sales order usi...

kind regards, 

Philipp

entry.title: Hide tab Collect PR indicator in CJ20N (SAP Project Systems:Project builder)
entry.content:
Hello Community,

If you come across a customer requirement to hide the collect PR indicator tab from project definition level in CJ20N then here is a simple & standard solution.

           1)Execute transaction SE18

           2)Select Radio Button "Enhancement spot"

           3)Enter name: "ES_SAPLCJWB_PS1"

           4)Click on Create

           5)In the next pop-up enter short-text: "EhP3 Enhancement to Hide Collective PR Tab"

           6)Select Technology: "BAdi Definition" and Composite Enhancement Spot: "ESC_CN_PSP_OPR_PS"

           7)Click on OK

           8)Assign to package: "PS_ST_EHP3_SFWS_SC"

           9)Under the tree-control for BAdi definitions click on NEW

           10)Enter name: "BADI_PS_COLLPR_ENH" and Short Description: "BAdi Definition to Hide Collective PR Tab"

           11)Expand the above BAdi definition node and double click on Interface

           12)On the right side screen enter interface name: "IF_BADI_PS_COLLPR_ENH" and click on EDIT

           13)In the create confirmation pop-up click on YES

           14)Assign the interface to package: "PS_ST_EHP3_SFWS_SC"

           15)In the save confirmation pop-up click on YES

           16)Under the Methods tab in the interface create an instance method by name: "HIDE_TAB"

           17)Select the above method and click on the button: "PARAMETERS"

           18)Create an Importing, Optional parameter I_PSPNR of type PS_INTNR and another Changing, Mandatory parameter C_HIDE of type FLAG

           19)Save the Interface

           20)Go back to Enhancement Spot screen and Activate it along with the BAdi definition, the interface and the composite enhancement spot

These steps are relevant for both SAP ECC and S/4HANA systems.

For detailed information, please refer to KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/2215903/E

Regards

Shubham Srivastava

entry.title: Re: SQLITE_CONSTRAINT: UNIQUE constraint failed error during CAP Tutorial Execution

entry.title: Re: Overcoming Challenges in Staffing Customer Projects with SAP Project and Resource Management
entry.content:

1. If demand is raised for 100 hours, still we are allowed to over staff. is there any option to restrict based on requested hours in demand.

2. the demand, and staffing hours should be done as per availability hours for each month and for each resource. eg: if we assign availability hours as 186 h for a resource then staffing for each month should be based on availability hours. is there a way to make that.

It will be helpful, if i have your input.

entry.title: Re: How can you create a Story Report that shows who has and doesn't have individual goals?
entry.content: You receive totally expect outcome taking into account your formula (basically count of goals). If you want to see Employees with and with goals, you need to use employees in the formula (something like, if employee has goal, then "Yes", if not, then "No")

entry.title: Redis on SAP BTP: When and Where to use Multi-AZ (Availability Zone)
entry.content:
High availability is no longer a luxury—it’s a necessity. In modern cloud-native applications running on SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP), even milliseconds of downtime can impact critical services. That’s where Multi-AZ (Availability Zone) configurations come into play.

In this blog post we try to explain when and where is relevant to enable Redis on SAP BTP in Multi-AZ mode, including its advantages, caveats, usage scenarios, and best practices to guide your architecture decision.

What is Multi-AZ configuration?

Multi-AZ stands for multi-availability zone. It refers to a deployment configuration where the service is replicated across multiple availability zones within a region.

In Redis on SAP BTP offering, enabling Multi-AZ means:

  • Redis nodes are distributed across separate data centers (AZs).
  • If one AZ fails, failover happens automatically to another zone.
  • Designed for fault tolerance, disaster recovery, and uptime guarantees.

Mutli-AZ is supported by the hyperscalers, the zones used are in accordance to their setup. Not all hyperscalers support Multi-AZ in the same way, for some is is only available for premium service plan and for example in GCP Multi-AZ is enabled by default. For more details check here.

Why Multi-AZ matters for Redis on SAP BTP

Redis on SAP BTP is widely used in applications for example:

  • Caching frequently accessed data.
  • Session cache for apps.
  • Feature toggles, counters, and leaderboard management.

Additionally and for small and simple scenarios can also be used for queueing and pub/sub systems.

In any of these cases, a single point of failure could bring down critical functionality. Multi-AZ offers an extra layer of protection against such risks.

When NOT to use Multi-AZ

❌ Development or testing environments

Why not: Increased cost and complexity are not justified. Use single-AZ or standalone Redis for test stages.

❌ Non-critical caching

Why not: The impact of cache miss or downtime is minimal; fallback mechanisms can sufficient.

Advantages of using Multi-AZ on SAP BTP

Benefit

Description

High Availability

Automatic failover across AZs maintains service continuity.

Fault Tolerance

Survives full AZ outages without data loss or manual intervention.

Improved SLA Compliance

Helps meet higher uptime % guarantees.

Disaster Recovery

Reduces MTTR (Mean Time to Recovery) during infrastructure failure.

Warnings and limitations

  • ⚠️ Higher cost: Multi-AZ instances are more expensive due to replication and HA setup.
  • ⚠️ Slight latency overhead: data replication across AZs may add marginal latency to write operations.
  • ⚠️ Not a substitute for backups: Multi-AZ protects from AZ failure but not from accidental key deletions or application-level bugs. Regular backups are still essential.
  • ⚠️ Write failover isn’t instantaneous: During AZ failover, a few seconds of write unavailability may occur while the Redis leader re-elects.

Best practices

  1. Enable Multi-AZ only for production workloads where uptime is critical.
  2. Combine with TTLs and eviction policies to manage memory pressure.
  3. Design apps for failover resilience, e.g., retry logic or fallback data sources.
  4. Consider latency-sensitive use cases - test impact of cross-AZ write latency on app performance.

Final thoughts

Using Multi-AZ  configuration for Redis on SAP BTP is a powerful feature within SAP BTP that supports enterprise-grade resilience. For business-critical workloads where data availability and performance are non-negotiable, enabling Multi-AZ configuration provides a strong safety net.

However, it’s not a “set-and-forget” silver bullet. Understand your application’s fault tolerance needs, test failover scenarios, and weigh the cost against the business value. Enabling Multi-AZ for Redis on SAP BTP only makes sense if you consider multi-AZ also for other components of your landscape.

Please remember

It will not make any sense to have only your instance(s) of Redis protected and working if other systems/applications/cloud services that support you business scenario are not protected, and in case of disaster will not work!

 
Thanks for reading!
For more insights from the product team on Redis on SAP BTP, don't miss to read:
  • Redis on SAP BTP - INDEX of official blog posts
Regards, 
Antonio

entry.title: Re: the APIs for the Production Order component
entry.content:
@omega-ou 
In ADT, in your development system, open the business object interface I_PRODUCTIONORDERTP.
At the top, you can access the documentation.

In the right-hand window, you can see code examples for each operation.


You can also explore this business object at the link: https://api.sap.com/bointerface/I_PRODUCTIONORDERTP

BR Oleg

entry.title: Procedure to close the production orders linked tothe purchase orders
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

My customer wants to close the old production orders because the closing month procedure is very long, and it's takes 7 hours. They have also Material ledger active, so the procedure involves 1) WIP calculation 2) variances calculation 3) settlement cost 4) material ledger's execution.
The first three step process also the old production orders, which are closed (status TECO, Closed or delivery completed) from many years.
So, we want to close the old production orders, setting them the status "delation flag" . This is possible with the standard program PPARCHP1
Some orders can't be processed by this program, because are linked to purchase order, so before close the production order we must close the purchase order, but seems that the only way to do that is put the Bin "delate option" on the item linked to the production order, whether the item is still open (no good receipt) or item is closed (good receipt and invoice)

 


I want to ask if is the correct way to proceed because My customer doesn't like put the bin on the position, especially if the item has a final invoice.

 

Best regards,
Sharon

entry.title: Re: Country COA for Morocco
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

In CBC, when defining the Organizational Structure and Scope, SAP may propose a standard country COA if one exists for Morocco.

Unfortunately, as of now, SAP does not deliver a predefined Moroccan COA out-of-the-box.

You can double-check this during the scoping phase by:

  • Navigating to the "Define Scope" phase in CBC
  • Reviewing the list of available Charts of Accounts for selection

If Morocco isn’t listed, then proceed to create a custom one.

 

How to create a custom COA :

Use a reference COA (like France) as a template

Since you can’t directly “copy” COAs in CBC, here’s the workaround:

  • During the Define Configuration Values step, create a custom COA (e.g., YMC)
  • Use France’s COA or another similar one as a reference
  • Export that COA structure (if you have access in another system or tenant)
  • Adjust the accounts as needed for Moroccan rules
  • Upload your G/L accounts using the mass upload template provided in CBC or by your SAP implementation partner

For more details, you can find the below Help SAP documentation regarding this topic :

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/94b3daefa5f446ce8d7481bac28e0c8b.html?locale=en-US&profile=20324530

 

I hope those elements will help you solve your issue.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: CAP - Creating composition entities of draft enabled entities by code fails
entry.content:
Hello,

I am having some trouble with creating multiple records of an entity associated with a draft-enabled entity.

I have 2 entities which have a 1-n composition between each other (it is only a one-way relationship):

entity ParentEntity : cuid, managed {
    ...
    Children : Composition of many ChildEntity on Children.parentId = ID;
}

entity ChildEntity : cuid, managed {
    ...
    value : String not null;
    parentId : UUID not null;
}

I have enabled drafts for the parent entity in my service.

using db from ...;
service Service {
    @odata.draft.enabled
    entity ParentEntity as projection on db.ParentEntity;
    entity ChildEntity as projection on db.ChildEntity;
}

Now in my code, I want to create multiple children entities. In CAP v7, this was possible by simply creating the child entity records and specifying the key of the parent.

// this used to work in CAP v7
const query = INSERT.into('ChildEntity').entries([
    {..., value: 'abc', parentId: ...},
    {..., value: 'def', parentId: ...},
    ...
]);
await service.run(query);

However, with CAP v8 a restriction is added, that draft-enabled entities can only be modified by their root entities. My issue is, that this doesn't allow creation of multiple records.

// WORKS - creates a single record
const query = INSERT.into('ParentEntity[<ID>].Children').entries(
    {..., value: 'abc', parentId: <ID>}
);

// DOESN'T WORK - attempts o create multiple records
const query = INSERT.into('ParentEntity[<ID>].Children').entries([
    {..., value: 'abc', parentId: <ID>},
    {..., value: 'def', parentId: <ID>},
    ...
]);
// OR
const children = [...]
const query = INSERT
    .into('ParentEntity[<ID>].Children')
    .entries(...children);

 

Our workaround is currently running multiple queries asynchronously (with await Promise.all). Is this behaviour intended and if yes, there a different way of creating multiple draft-enabled records?

Thank you for your help.
Atakan

PS: I am experiencing this issue on @SAP/cds v8.8.3.

entry.title: Re: CAPM email issue : Concurrent connections limit excee...
entry.content:
Is your action is configured for parallel execution? There is an 'InvocationGrouping' setting which defines if an action in a list report is executed sequentially (isolated) for each of the selected items, or in parallel (change set). See https://ui5.sap.com/#/topic/cbf16c599f2d4b8796e3702f7d4aae6c

If your invocation setting is set to change set then your function will be executed in parallel so the SDK might be overloaded with requests. Switch to isolated and have a look at the Chrome Network tab to ensure there are sequential singular batch requests sent to your CAP application where the next batch is only sent when the previous one completed (returned 200).

{
  $Type : 'UI.DataFieldForAction',
  Label : 'Send email',
  Action: 'MyService.sendMail',
  InvocationGrouping : #Isolated
},

 

In case you want to send bulk emails, it would be better to use an action defined in an extension instead of a standard Fiori Elements action. In such custom action you will receive a single call in the extension handler with a list of selected rows so you can execute the sendEmail to all receivers at once.

entry.title: Re: SAP Workzone Local Entry Point plan availability
entry.content: Sorry guys, I'm not aware of whether the screenshot is internal only or not. BTP control center should not be internal coz you can see it anywhere in the internet. It's already GA, however, I think it is only available for some SKUs. It would be better to check whether the entitlement can be assigned for the specific commercial license.

entry.title: Re: Understanding SAP’s Product Strategy for Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) Solutions
entry.content:
Hi all,

is there any update about release time point of new GRC SUITE 2026?
I cannot find any official information beside "Q1 / 2026".

Thanks a lot in advance.

Greetings,

Stefan

entry.title: Re: In my case, After creation of PO, PR are not closing automatically. is their is any missing con
entry.content: To get [better] answers, add some information related to your SAP version, and on the PR/PO creation, full quantity, etc.

entry.title: Re: Copy Table from query manager does not copy all the rows
entry.content: Personally I use the copy table function because in my experience the Export to Excel function is cumbersome and error prone. Although it depends on the situation of course.

entry.title: Re: ML4HMASTER229
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

I found a similar issue on the S4 hana version (not cloud) which has been solved apparently.

Could you please check it and see if it can be helpful for your issue ?

Here's the link below :

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/control-records-for-actual-ccs-missing-for-valuation-area-1710/qaq-p/14099026 

I hope this will help you.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: CAP $expand external service
entry.content:
Hi @VoJu ,

I hope you found a solution already. I had luck with something like this in which masterBlockData is the master table and sma an association to another table.

SELECT.from('masterBlockData', (mbp) => {
          mbp`.*`,
            mbp.sma((sma) => {
              sma`.*`;
            });
        }).limit(10)

 I know its late but I hope it helps.

entry.title: 历史导入固定资产减值业务如何操作
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

     请问历史导入固定资产减值业务如何操作呢,针对非历史导入资产,可以通过APP(过账资产重估)操作,但对历史导入资产操作时会报错,具体如附件截图,谢谢!

entry.title: Re: Connect with SAP Community at SAP Sapphire and Share Your Special SAP Event Moment!
entry.content:
Great picture @SergioG_TX! I wasn't aware, but I'm truly humbled I have helped to inspire you! Next to Sapphire I believe we have met at one or two TechEd's in Vegas as well! Unfortunately I won't make it to Sapphire this year, but looking forward to meet again in the future buddy!

Next to Sergio there are a few other people I have fond memories of. While I knew most of them from SCN already, I have met them in person Sapphire for the first time -- like Sergio 😉

 

So from left to right, from top to bottom, there's @abesh . Wonderful person, great family guy, highly knowledgeable. Stayed at our place with his family for a couple of days, and I'm hoping to meet him in person anytime soon!

Next, there's @boobboo and Julia Dorbic. Chris is one of my SAP rockstar heroes, someone I take as an example. I've met Chris on many occasions, and fun was always guaranteed. Julia's no longer working in SAP space, and while I have met her prior to Sapphire, she deserves a special mention for taking care of me when I was hospitalized in Orlando. I couldn't thank her enough for that!

Bottom left, there's Njal Stabell, co-founder of Neptune Software. While we had quite some discussions and disagreements online for a while, we actually met in person for the first time in the men's room at the Amway Theatre during the Sapphire concert, and we became best friends ever since. Love you, buddy!

The final picture is a candid picture I took of Hasso Plattner at an SAP Mentor's pre-conference meeting at Sapphire 2014. I have never shared this picture, but I think now 11 years later, any repercussions may have expired 😉 His personality, the way he conveyed his message and his level of understanding made an everlasting impression. As it happened to be my very first Sapphire attendance as well, it set the bar high of what to expect from a Sapphire conference. I have tried to attend as much as possible, and unfortunately I haven't been able to attend since Covid happened. But who knows, I'm looking forward to a future opportunity!

So to everyone who's attending this year, I wish you an awesome conference!

entry.title: Re: Change warning "cost center x locked for primary post...
entry.content: Did you already try to change this message control in OBA5 ?

entry.title: Search function in the app "Display IAM-Apps" returns error code
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
i noticed, that when i try to use the free text search function in the app "Display IAM-Apps" i get the error "ABAP Runtime error 'RAISE_SHORTDUMP'".
It also doesnt matter what i search. I tried this in 3 different tenants (TDD - Customizing Tenant, TDD - Development Tenant and a Customer Starter System Tenant) and all return the same error code. The individual filters in the app still work but not the free text search. Is this a configuration issue of some sort or a case for a ticket with SAP ?
Best regards Lukas

entry.title: Re: Problem with authorization objects in G/L account bal...
entry.content: So problem comes from logical database SDF

entry.title: Re: CAP application not working with HANA Cloud DB after...
entry.content:
If the application works in one environment but not the other, there is probably nothing wrong with the app, but with the environment in which it runs.

You can check the HANA Cloud instance to see if it is up-to-date. Newer versions of the @cap-js/hana package might require a newer version of the HANA Cloud database as well.

entry.title: Update of SEPA formats pain.001.001.09 ByD
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

As of November 2025, all banks in Germany will be legally required to support a new SEPA format in accordance with ISO22002. Many customers are already inquiring about this. According to the roadmap, this new format is expected to be available in Business ByDesign with release 2505 (Update of SEPA data formats for the customer-bank interface for SEPA credit transfer initiations (pain.001.001.09 message) and SEPA direct debit initiation (pain.008.001.08 message)).

However, there is no mention of this in the release notes. I would therefore like to request a status update on whether and when this format will be available.

Thank you in advance and best regards.

entry.title: Re: In my case, After creation of PO, PR are not closing automatically. is their is any missing con
entry.content: Version is RISE,

entry.title: Can meritGuideline be used in a custom formula for Budget calculation
entry.content:
I have scenario where the budget calculation in a Compensation templates needs to be 'meritGuideline' plus an amount from a custom field (meritGuideline + customTopUpFTE).  However, the dollar amount from meritGuideline isn't being included in the output in the field and so no Budget is being applied to the worksheet.

Because 'merit' is going to change at manager discretion, we can't use that field.

Is it possible to do this without creating the guideline manually?

entry.title: Re: CAP application not working with HANA Cloud DB after...

entry.title: AI units license in Sales Demo for SuccessFactors Recruiting MS Teams integration
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

we have a commercialized Sales Demo (SFCPART) and are using it mainly for Demos in SuccessFactors Recruiting. We would like to configure "Generating Interview Questions", which is part of the interviews functionality with the integration of Microsoft Teams. One prerequisite is the AI units license.

Is it possible to acquire the AI units license for a Sales Demo and is the mentioned feature available in this environment?

 

Many thanks,

Judith

entry.title: How to find the form template code for variants of SDK-created print forms in C4C?
entry.content:
Hi Community,
We have created a new print form for the Lead object via the SDK. The code of this form is available in the SDK solution.

Later, we created two language-specific versions of this form via the Form Template Maintenance work center in C4C.

Now we want to use these versions at the solution (e.g., to trigger printing via ABSL), but we cannot find the form code that is required for this.

The form template code is not visible in the Form Template Maintenance UI.
We also tried to find it via Business Configuration, OData APIs, and data sources, but without success.

Does anyone know how we can retrieve the form template code for such forms versions created via SDK and maintained in C4C?
Any guidance would be appreciated!

entry.title: Getting Error while creating item
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have defined one initiative type, when we are trying to create item for custom item type under initiative getting below error

But with standard item type, I am able to create item successfully. Kindly help me to solve this issue.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: In my case, After creation of PO, PR are not closing automatically. is their is any missing con
entry.content: version is rise, scenario: suppose user created a purchase requisition of quantity 20 nos, and then they make PO by using the same PR. but after creating the PO my PR is not getting closed automatically, means user can again create the PO of 20 quantity again by using same PR. my business requirement is to close the PR after PO is created against same. is there is any config for the same.

entry.title: Re: HANA Migrated calculation views produces different execution plan
entry.content:
Hi guys,

sorry for re-commenting on this old topic.

I was just wondering if there are any chances that this problem could occur without this difference in the underlying data.

I saw the same behavior in the same TEST environment on a dataflow that has been unchanged for more than a year.

Suddenly, execution plan looks a certain way, and performance is terrible. Runs out of memory after a few minutes of running.

The next day, execution plan suddenly looks different and performance ok, everything is working fine.

I tried to track down if there are any changes to the underlying SAP HANA tables used in this dataflow but everything looks the same between these runs.

Any ideas about other possible causes to this issue, except from data differences?

entry.title: Need to delete wrongly loaded materials or ability to change material type in mass in S4HC
entry.content:
Need to delete wrongly loaded materials or ability to change material type in mass in S4HC


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Need to delete wrongly loaded materials or ability to...
entry.content:
The wrongly created materials can be deleted using archiving Object MM_MATNR 

 

In S/4HANA Cloud the App Change Material Typeis availabe for changing the material type of a material but can only be used for one material at a time

 

An app to mass change material type is not available.

entry.title: Re: ML4HMASTER229
entry.content: First of all thanks @Jeremy_Deo, but the problem is still the same even though I did the MMPV. I couldn't find a different solution for the Public Cloud system.

entry.title: Re: whole process of support project
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: Re: Purging data in SAP BW4HANA
entry.content:
If the ADSO has static partitions, then the partition itself is not deleted. It stays there, but will be empty. You are just removing the data, but not the partition itself.

Why is it a problem, that an empty partition is visible anyways?

entry.title: Re: ML4HMASTER229
entry.content:
Hello again dear user,

Then I suggest you to open an incident to SAP to see what could be done providing the more details possible.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: How can I make appear the internal price in the service quotation & Service order?
entry.content:
Dear all

I may have missed something, but in the price details in the service quotation or service order, there is no condition type reflecting the internal price that permit to have the cost related to the service needed to be quote.

It seems to be that if the item is not relevant to stock valuation, there is nothing in the price detail that offer the possibility to have a clear view about the cost. Even entering a price in the accounting view. Nothing is taken back and shown in price detail.

How do this needs have to be managed?

The sales rep needs to be able to have the cost reflected in the service quotation in the price detail in order to have the base to quote correctly.

Please help

Ingrid

entry.title: Re: Remove Quality stock from Available stock in MD04
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it HU managed material.do you want the system should not consider quality stock calculations during mrp run in background.

entry.title: Re: In my case, After creation of PO, PR are not closing...
entry.content:
Did users not set the 'Set reqs. to "closed"' box when creating the purchase order?

  • Read first 2055842 - Closed indicator in Purchase Requisition is not set automatically - SAP ERP & SAP S/4HANA 
  • As far as I know, only an Abaper will be able to trigger this behaviour, not some customising ☹️.
    (Using some BAdI/Eng to force the flag or scheduling a job to set the flag with BAPI-PO_CHANGE/POSCHEDULE/REQ_CLOSED)

entry.title: Operation defect rate (%) (AUFAK) item in the work procedure master
entry.content:
Regarding the "Operation defect rate (%) (AUFAK)" item in the work procedure master,
the item does not exist in the migration cockpit, so how should I migrate the data?
There is no way to update the data after migration, so could you please tell me a good way to do this?

entry.title: Re: Get Hands-on with SAP Products: Free Practice System Access on learning.sap.com
entry.content: @KALIDINDIAVINASHVARMA we do not have this option. But there is a BTP Trial version

entry.title: Re: NWP1 button not working
entry.content: Hello, Can you see if the issue depends on a particular GUI theme? Are you using the latest patch 12? Are all users affected?

entry.title: Re: 4H2 Selfbilling - Can we have more than 999 billing i...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, the system still has the 999-line item limit for billing and accounting documents, even in the Self-Billing (4H2) process.

This means that, although you can have more than 999 billing items in the SBI transfer, the system will automatically split them into multiple documents once it creates the invoices and accounting documents. So, it won’t be able to process 1500 billing items in a single document without breaking it up.

Unfortunately, this is a system limitation in the Cloud version, and there isn’t a way to increase this limit through customization or configuration. The split happens automatically, and this process should be transparent to your users.

I hope this will answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Journal Entry API XML example with item with 0% VAT tax
entry.content: Hello, for documents that include tax, it's important to ensure that the tax code is included in the item sections. Additionally, the ProductTaxItem should be added accordingly. If you've attempted these adjustments and need further assistance, please feel free to share your payload here if possible, and I'll be happy to review it for you.

entry.title: Re: How can I copy dimension members between private dimensions in 2 separate models
entry.content: Thanks Ivan - this seems like a great option - thank you for your support on this.

entry.content: Thanks for this write-up. But when I see the word "flow" I somehow expected to see a graph (see SAP help) - just for reference purposes

entry.title: Stop Reservations Without Stock Available
entry.content: We Need to stop creating reservation for Material if there is no available Stock in Storage Location and check is there other reservations for Same material & Storage Location created

entry.title: Can the service bundle be pre-configured with specific materials?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

In the Service scope 3D2, it mentions that service bundles can be created in advance. In that case, is it possible to also predefine the materials for those service bundles, so that users don’t need to manually create them every time they select a bundle?

Thanks,

Noni

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Service

entry.title: Re: PIR Consumption & Reduction
entry.content:
Thank you! Most asked question indeed - not only in interviews & exams. 🙂 

Fo reference purposes, I always found SAP notes 772856 & 772857 as well as 47045 absolute must-reads.

entry.title: SF Variable Pay - View Details
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We have the following two questions related to the "View Details" option for Variable Pay:

1) We are using two business goal sections and would like to name them accordingly. As an example, see below the screenshot from a Sales Demo, where under "View Details", the section is labeld with "Organization Performance". 

In this second screenshot, you can see our current configuration, with the labels missing for the two business goal sections:

Where can we add the labels accordingly? Any input is appreciated.

2) Additionally, we would like to change the order. We want to list first the section for the Individual Objectives, before the business goal sections. The order of the columns is already set accordingly (starting with Individual Objectives) under "Design Worksheet" -> "Column Designer". 

Is this possible, and if so, how?

entry.title: Re: Acceptance required during transfer of goods from one storage location to other storage location
entry.content: Deleted

entry.title: 2 payment XML are generated for F110 payment run (For Turkey and France) separately
entry.content:
when we done the payment Run for vendors in different countries two payment INFO generated in a single XML for the vendors in turkey we have one payment info and for the other vendors we have another payment info which got generated in the XML separately and the same has been sent to Finance team in Different XML's.

Business requirement is to get all the payment info data in a single XML. Someone please guide?

XML ids attached for your reference. (<pmtinf> tag blocks are appearing twice in XML)

entry.title: Re: How to Restrict an Employee from Overbooking the time in S4HANA Cloud for Professional Services
entry.content:
Thank you for the blog. We implemented the same kind of logic under BADI HCM: Timesheet Validations.

But the code is working for the PM's who has access to the CDS (Professional service role), it is not working for users who is having only time entry role access.

Will it restrict based on any roles??

Hoping for your reply

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting with ATP check for MRP Area requirement
entry.content:
It is not possible to create additional Requirement Classes or assign existing ones to some of the Item Category Types in the CBC of SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud edition.

Enhancing the Subcontracting Process to use ATP when creating Outbound Delivery is only possible through Expert Configuration.

entry.title: Top 5 Reasons Why SAP ATTP on S/4HANA is the Superior Choice to SAP ATTP on NetWeaver
entry.content:
SAP Advanced Track and Trace for Pharmaceuticals (SAP ATTP) isn't just software; it's a powerful weapon in the fight against drug counterfeiting. Imagine: total visibility of every dose, bulletproof compliance, and real protection for patients. That's the promise of SAP ATTP, end-to-end track and trace for unshakeable supply chain integrity.

For years, SAP ATTP on Netweaver technology has been a reliable solution, delivering essential serialization and compliance. But tech evolves fast. Netweaver, while dependable, is aging and has becoming a legacy system, struggling to keep pace with today's technology demands. Time is running out: SAP's end of maintenance for Netweaver is December 2027. The message is clear: future-proof your operations by upgrading.

So, where does the industry go from here? The answer lies in a next-generation platform designed to catapult your track and trace capabilities into the future. Think of it as a high-performance upgrade. This evolution is SAP ATTP built on the S/4HANA technology foundation. Powered by SAP HANA, it delivers superior performance, scalability, and a modern user experience. Expect speed, agility, real-time insights, and the power to achieve airtight compliance, optimize operations, and crush counterfeit drugs with data.

A frequent question from C-level executives is: "What are the key differences between the SAP ATTP on Netweaver and SAP ATTP on S/4HANA platforms?" They need this clarity to make timely and informed decisions about their technology roadmap. This blog answers that crucial question by revealing the top 5 reasons why the move to SAP ATTP on S/4HANA is essential for pharmaceutical and biopharma companies looking to future-proof their serialization and traceability. In this Blog, We Will Cover:

  1. Top 5 Comparison Area: SAP ATTP NetWeaver vs. SAP ATTP on S/4HANA 
  2. Considerations for a Smooth Conversion to SAP ATTP on S/4HANA 
  3. Conclusion: Future-Proofing Your Supply Chain with SAP ATTP on S/4HANA

1. Top 5 Comparison Area: SAP ATTP NetWeaver vs. SAP ATTP on S/4HANA 

The table below highlights the key differences between SAP ATTP NetWeaver and SAP ATTP on S/4HANA. Let us explain these differences one by one.

SAP ATTP on NetWeaver vs. SAP ATTP on S/4HANA

1.1 Enhanced Core Features

Think of it as an upgrade! SAP ATTP on S/4HANA boosts the core capabilities of SAP ATTP on Netweaver with a slicker user experience, faster data processing, and a modern design. This optimized foundation tackles today’s compliance and serialization needs and sets you up to harness the power of future AI.  

1.2 Superior User Experience

Out with the old, in with the new! SAP ATTP on Netweaver’s traditional SAP GUI can be clunky, slow navigation, limited flexibility, and a learning curve, especially for new employees. In contrast, SAP ATTP on S/4HANA shines with the modern SAP Fiori interface, offering intuitive navigation, role-based access, and built-in analytics. Expect a seamless, responsive, and engaging experience across all your devices, making everyone more productive.  

1.3 Unparalleled Performance

SAP ATTP on Netweaver's performance depends on the database and its optimization, scalability, and management. In contrast, SAP S/4HANA, powered by the SAP HANA database, accelerates data processing and analytics for faster transactions, reduced delays, and better handling of large data volumes, enabling quicker decisions and smoother traceability. This platform also leverages real-time data analytics to transform data into a strategic asset, driving faster, data-driven decisions and proactive supply chain optimization for improved compliance and efficiency.  

1.4 Future-Proof AI Innovation

It's time to move forward. Netweaver's end of maintenance means no new features. SAP's innovation is now centered on S/4HANA, with the SAP ATTP roadmap prioritizing AI-driven use cases within a next-generation traceability solution designed to deliver deeper insights and proactive compliance across the pharmaceutical supply chain

1.5 Seamless Integration

Keep your connections! SAP ATTP on NetWeaver integrates smoothly with key SAP solutions. The move to SAP ATTP on S/4HANA is designed to be just as smooth, maintaining these vital connections through a decoupled architecture. This protects your existing integrations, minimizes upgrade hassles, and lets you capitalize on the enhanced performance and smart capabilities of SAP’s next-gen platform.  

2. Considerations for a Smooth Conversion to SAP ATTP on S/4HANA 

It's a common question I hear from C-level executives: "Does upgrading to SAP ATTP on S/4HANA force us to completely overhaul our entire ERP system to the latest S/4HANA version?" The good news is, that's a myth! The upgrade to SAP ATTP on S/4HANA is decoupled. It doesn't necessitate a full-scale ERP business transformation. For a detailed explanation of the steps involved and to demystify any misconceptions, I highly recommend checking out this insightful blog: Demystifying SAP ATTP Upgrade / Conversion / Database Migration and Cloud.

 

 

 

 

 

3. Conclusion: Future-Proofing Your Supply Chain with SAP ATTP

Upgrading to SAP ATTP on S/4HANA isn't just a tech upgrade; it's a strategic move to gain a decisive competitive edge in the pharmaceutical and biopharma arena. You'll get more than just the latest features, you'll gain the power to conquer regulatory hurdles, fine-tune your supply chain for peak efficiency, and fuel significant growth.  

Ready to take the next step in your traceability journey? What questions do you have about upgrading to SAP ATTP on S/4HANA? Ask away in the comments!

entry.title: Can service orders use credit limits?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I would like to ask if credit limit control can be enabled for service orders.

Thanks,

Noni

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Service

entry.title: Re: How to Restrict an Employee from Overbooking the time in S4HANA Cloud for Professional Services
entry.content:
Hi @Shahana

If you include the WITH PRIVILEGED ACCESS clause in your SELECT statement, the logic will work for all users regardless of their assigned roles. This clause allows access to data even if the user does not have direct authorization for the underlying CDS view.
So, you can avoid role-based access restrictions by using  WITH PRIVILEGED ACCESS in your code.

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Where can I find the non stock item catagery in service order?
entry.content:
Dear all,

I can't find the table related to the link between the product type, item category group and item category available for Service Order.

We need to use the non stock item category in solution order. The list in help sap provide this item category but we have no visibility of it in the system.

Please help to understand what are the actions to do to be able to have the non stock item category in the service order.

Thanks

Ingrid

entry.title: document type in Settlement Profile internal orders TKB1V-BLART
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

currently we need some further information to understanding the customized document type in the settlement profile of internal orders under S4.

- In which business transactions is this customized document type used? only for FI, only for CO transactions?

- What is the relation to the different ledgers?

It would be nice if you could share your experiences on this topic and how you use this field.

Thanks and best regards!
